yn_consent1.legal_obligation: Personal data shall be processed only upon obtaining valid consent of the Data Principal.
yn_consent1.risk_event: Unlawful processing of personal data without valid consent.

yn_consent3.legal_obligation: Data Fiduciary must be able to demonstrate consent when required.
yn_consent3.risk_event: Inability to prove lawful processing if challenged.

yn_pn1.legal_obligation: Data Principal must be informed of purpose and processing details via notice.
yn_pn1.risk_event: Data Principal unaware of processing activities.

yn_pn4.risk_event: Complaints may directly escalate to Data Protection Board.

tc_enc_rest.legal_obligation: Implement reasonable security safeguards to protect personal data.
tc_enc_rest.risk_event: Unauthorized access or disclosure of personal data.

tc_mfa.legal_obligation: Restrict access to personal data to authorized personnel only.
tc_mfa.risk_event: Unauthorized internal access to personal data.

tc_fw.legal_obligation: Protect systems handling personal data from external intrusion.
tc_fw.risk_event: External cyber intrusion and data breach.

yn_bm3.legal_obligation: Notify Data Protection Board and affected Data Principals upon breach.
yn_bm3.risk_event: Regulatory enforcement action after unreported breach.

yn_gov1.legal_obligation: Assign responsible officer for compliance oversight.
yn_gov1.risk_event: Lack of accountability for personal data processing.
